author: The Canons of the Councils of Ancyra, Gangra, Neocæsarea, Antioch and Laodicea, which Canons were Accepted and Received by the Ecumenical Synods
book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Councils of Ancyra, Gangra, Neocæsarea, Antioch and Laodicea, which Canons were Accepted and Received by the Ecumenical Synods.
The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Councils of Ancyra, Gangra, Neocæsarea, Antioch and Laodicea, which Canons were Accepted and Received by the Ecumenical Synods

title: Canon XVIII.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: If any who have been constituted bishops, but have not been received by the parish to which they were designated, shall invade other parishes and wrong the constituted [bishops] there, stirring up seditions against them, let such persons be suspended from office and communion.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: But if they are willing to accept a seat among the presbyterate, where they formerly were presbyters, let them not be deprived of that honour.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: But if they shall act seditiously against the bishops established there, the honour of the presbyterate also shall be taken from them and themselves expelled.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: If a bishop who has been duly constituted, is not received by the Church to which he was elected, but gives trouble to other bishops, let him be excommunicated.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: If he wishes to be numbered among the presbyters, let him be so numbered.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: But if he shall be at outs with the bishops duly constituted there, let him be deprived of the honour of being even a presbyter.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: The word I have translated “suspended from office and communion” is ἀφορίζεσθαι .

verses.book: The Canons of the Council of Ancyra.
verses.text: Suicer in his Thesaurus shews that this word does not mean only, as some have supposed, a deprivation of office and dignity (e.g., Van Espen), but also an exclusion from the communion of the Church.
